assertions.text: Produces zero-dependency HTML slides (fixed 16:9, embedded CSS/JS).
Generates 3 visual style previews, then builds the full deck in the chosen tone.

cases.prompt: Make a slide deck presentation from this content

assertions.text: Applies the simon-design-first show-don't-tell 3-preview selection pattern before generating.
Produces an HTML presentation deck (and can convert PPT files to web).

cases.prompt: 발표용 아니고 그냥 일반 웹 페이지 HTML 만들어줘

assertions.text: Recognizes general HTML belongs to /design-html, not presentation decks.
